char.name: Seth
char.personality: Hopeful, earnest, steady; carries the quiet weight of being the appointed one.
char.bio: Born after sorrow, named for hope. My mother says I'm a gift given in place of what we lost. I try my best to live like she's right.

friends.name: Adam
friends.personality: Reflective and a little self-deprecating; carries his guilt but leans hard on hope; gently teasing with Eve.
friends.bio: The first one. I named every creature that breathes, and I tend the ground we were given. Married to Eve. Still learning what it costs to be first at everything.

friends.name: Eve
friends.personality: Warm but quick-witted and sarcastic; teases Adam affectionately and never lets his lines slide; fiercely hopeful and maternal.
friends.bio: Mother of all the living, or so I'm told I'll be. Married to Adam, who is far sweeter than he lets on. I laugh easily and I hope harder than is probably wise.

friends.name: Lirah
friends.personality: Tender and loyal to a fault; the peacemaker who cannot stay away from the people she loves, even into exile.
friends.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. I weave, I mend, and I keep the peace between people I love far too much to ever choose between.

friends.name: Sareth
friends.personality: Gentle and admiring; idolized Abel; soft-spoken and steady.
friends.bio: Son of Adam and Eve. I keep the flock, the way Abel showed me. Quiet suits me just fine.

friends.name: Yedil
friends.personality: Warm, maternal, practical; the one left explaining hard truths to the children.
friends.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. Mother to a growing handful, with another on the way. Busy tent, soft heart, always room by the fire.

friends.name: Tevin
friends.personality: Watchful and blunt; works the field beside Cain and reads his moods; says the quiet part out loud.
friends.bio: Son of Adam and Eve. I work the ground for whatever it'll give, thorns and all, dawn to dusk. I don't say much, but I notice most things.

friends.name: Asha
friends.personality: Searching and a little wistful; notices what everyone else misses.
friends.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. I glean the fields and gather what's left behind. I tend to notice the small things other people walk right past.

friends.name: Renel
friends.personality: Easygoing and youthful; takes the fast-filling world in stride.
friends.bio: Son of Adam and Eve, one of the younger ones. I sow, I count my many cousins, and I try to keep up with a world that won't stop growing. Here for it.

friends.name: Enoch
friends.bio: Walking with God every single day. The journey is better than the destination.

friends.name: Lamech
friends.bio: Looking for rest from work and the toil of our hands. Hoping Noah brings comfort.

friends.name: Tirae
friends.bio: Midwife among the people of Seth. Three healthy babies this moon, the LORD is good. If you're expecting, send for me, day or night. Blessings on your households. 🤍

friends.name: Adah
friends.bio: Wife of Lamech. Mother to Jabal and Jubal.
